description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with a weathered, olive-green finish and visible surface scratches and dents, suggesting heavy use or exposure to harsh environments. The barrel features two prominent horizontal reinforcement bands encircling its body, providing structural integrity. The top surface is slightly recessed with two small, round bungs or caps, likely for filling or emptying contents. One side of the barrel displays a yellow triangular warning label with a corrosive hazard symbol, indicating it may be used to store dangerous chemicals or waste. The surface has a matte, slightly rough texture with areas of discoloration and wear. The overall appearance is industrial and utilitarian, suitable for hazardous material storage in urban or industrial settings.
description: A weathered, olive-green metal barrel with reinforcement bands, surface scratches, and a corrosive hazard warning label.
description_view_0: The barrel is shown with two visible bungs on the top and surface scratches, but no warning label is visible from this angle.
description_view_1: This view shows a plain side of the barrel with one bung visible on the top and no markings or labels.
description_view_2: The barrel displays a dented surface and both bungs on the top, with a hint of the warning label just visible on the right edge.
description_view_3: The front of the barrel features a prominent yellow corrosive hazard warning label, with surface scratches and both reinforcement bands clearly visible.
